senses.gloss: elative degree of جَدِير (jadīr):; worthier; worthiest
elative degree of جَدِير (jadīr):; more appropriate; most appropriate

examples.text: ضَعْ عَلَى صَدْرِيَ يُمْنَاكَ فَمَا – أَجْدَرَ ٱلْمَاءَ بِإِطْفَاءِ ٱللَّهَبْ
examples.english: Place your right hand on my chest, how – adept the water is in putting out the flame
